label: Improvements
items: Readings and the AI Area Coach are now available right on the dashboard area view, not just in Location Management.
AI chat shows real plant photos with its suggestions and no longer leaves broken image placeholders when you ask to see a plant.
The AI Area Coach now gives consistent moisture / EC / temperature targets, backed by stored plant care data instead of re-estimating each time.
The profile menu now scrolls on smaller screens, so the bottom options are no longer cut off.
